overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a truck cabin driving on a snowy highway at night in a truck simulator game. The vehicle passes through a toll booth area and continues along the snow-covered road with other traffic visible, navigating gentle curves and overtaking slower vehicles.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from inside a truck cabin driving on a snowy highway at night. The road is covered in snow with guardrails visible on both sides. The vehicle approaches a toll booth structure in the distance while following another car. The dashboard and GPS are clearly visible in the foreground.

segments.scene_description: The truck enters and passes through a toll booth structure with overhead canopy and concrete lane barriers. The lighting changes slightly under the covered structure. After passing through, the vehicle exits back to the open highway environment.

segments.scene_description: The truck continues along the snowy highway, passing through gentle curves. A concrete noise barrier appears on the right side of the road. The vehicle overtakes a slower red car on the left while maintaining steady progress along the multi-lane highway.

segments.scene_description: The highway becomes more enclosed with concrete noise barriers on both sides. The truck overtakes a large semi-truck on the right while navigating a gentle curve. A blue parking sign indicating a rest area 200m ahead appears on the right side as the journey continues through the snowy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a snowy highway at night, moving from an open road through a toll plaza and into a more enclosed corridor. It begins with the vehicle following another car toward a distant toll booth, with the illuminated dashboard and GPS visible in the foreground. As the truck passes under the overhead canopy and through the concrete lane barriers of the toll structure, the lighting shifts momentarily before the scene opens back onto the snowy highway. The camera then tracks through gentle curves, passing a concrete noise barrier on the right and overtaking a red car on the left. Finally, the environment becomes more constricted by noise barriers on both sides as the truck overtakes a large semi-truck and passes a blue parking sign for an upcoming rest area.
